title: ServiceHealthReport
description: Supervisor health report emitted per managed service. ICD-8 contract. Used by the supervisor to track per-service liveness and restart-ladder state.

is_healthy.description: True if the most recent /healthz probe returned a non-5xx response within the timeout.

consecutive_failures.description: Number of consecutive failed health probes. Resets to 0 on first healthy probe.

restart_count.description: Cumulative number of docker restart calls issued for this service since supervisor start.

last_restart_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp of the most recent restart attempt, or null if never restarted.

in_boot_loop.description: True when the service has been restarted >= BOOT_LOOP_THRESHOLD times within FAST_FAIL_WINDOW_S seconds. When true, supervisor stops restarting and escalates to safe mode.

escalated.description: True when restart_count >= RESTART_THRESHOLD and the supervisor has stopped attempting further restarts pending operator intervention.

sampled_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp when this health sample was taken.
